title: Silky Spicy Dutch Rice Krispies Pilaf
description: A spicy and silky dutch dish featuring rice krispies cooked sous-vide for an elevated raw-friendly meal.

ingredients.name: Red pepper flakes (siracha paste for non-spicy option)

instructions: Preheat sous-vide to 160°F for the entire cooking time.
In a small pan, warm unsalted butter and garlic powder. Add rice krispies and saffron threads in this mixture until evenly coated with butter and infused with the spices.
Place prepared rice krispies mixture into preheated sous-vide bag, seal it, and cook for 1 hour at 160°F.

Once cooked, deglaze the pan with a little bit of olive oil to release any stuck bits on the bottom. Add red pepper flakes (or siracha paste), reduce temperature to low heat and stir until fully incorporated.
Transfer cooked rice krispies mixture from sous-vide back into pan. Stir in shredded parmesan cheese if using, along with a pinch of paprika for garnish.
Serve hot or at room temperature as a unique snack or side dish.
